underlying_goal: Implement a feature to pre-fill the gender for the first speaker in a new conversation form based on the user's last conversation history
friction_detail: Browser-based UI verification failed repeatedly due to session/cookie issues with headless browser, requiring fallback to Rails console and curl verification.
brief_summary: User wanted to implement gender pre-fill for the first speaker based on conversation history (INT-254); Claude implemented it across controller, schema, and form, verified via backend, shipped a PR with CI passing.
